subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath been stirred by the winds of the days of his Lord and hath turned toward the Dawning-Place of Revelation, that he may be made steadfast [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن تحرک من اریاح ایام ربه و اقبل الی مطلع الوحی لیجعله مستقیما
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
